title: Fix Admin Button Footer Link to Admin Dashboard

requirements.summary: Update the admin button in the ContactFooter component to navigate directly to the admin dashboard page (/admin) without requiring authentication or authorization checks
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the admin button in the footer navigates to the admin dashboard page
No 'Access Denied' screen appears when clicking the admin button
Admin dashboard page loads directly without authentication checks

file_operations.description: Update the admin button to use React Router's Link component with to='/admin' prop to enable direct navigation to the admin dashboard. Remove any onClick handlers or conditional logic that might prevent navigation. Ensure the button is always visible and clickable without authentication state checks.

requirements.summary: Remove or bypass authentication/authorization checks on the AdminDashboardPage component to allow direct access without login
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard page renders without checking for authentication state
Users can view admin dashboard content immediately upon navigation
No access denied or login redirect logic blocks access to the admin dashboard

file_operations.description: Remove or comment out all authentication and authorization checks including useInternetIdentity hook usage, isAuthenticated checks, isAdmin checks, and any conditional rendering of AccessDeniedScreen. Allow the dashboard content (QuickStatsCards and UserAssessmentDataTable components) to render immediately without waiting for authentication state. Keep all existing dashboard functionality and data fetching logic intact.
